system1_result:
The scenario requires George, Nina, and Robert to give reports on different days. Since George must report on Tuesday, Nina and Robert occupy Monday and Wednesday. However, if Nina were on Monday, Tuesday would need both Helen and Irving (due to the condition), conflicting with George on Tuesday. If Nina were on Tuesday, she'd share the day with George. Thus Nina must be on Wednesday and Robert on Monday. Robert cannot give an afternoon report, so he is Monday morning. With Nina on Wednesday, no further constraints apply. Helen can be on Wednesday, as it has an open slot. Olivia cannot be on Monday (afternoon slot, she can't be afternoon) and Robert cannot be on Wednesday (different days required). Thus only (A) is possible.

```json
{"answer": "A"}
```
